title: Non-record: Text Diffusion (MDLM) — Masked Discrete Diffusion (val_bpb 3.3801)
author: dentity007

data.description: Hybrid autoregressive + diffusion training with a 30/70 AR-to-masked-diffusion loss split
Bidirectional attention for masked prediction and causal attention for autoregressive evaluation

novel_contributions: First diffusion-based submission to Parameter Golf
Bidirectional attention for masked prediction with causal attention for AR evaluation
Implements text diffusion / masked discrete diffusion (MDLM)
